title: Extract _assert_only_called helper in TestTabPerTabFetching
analysis: TestTabPerTabFetching (lines 994-1107 of tests/test_media_detail.py) has 6 test methods verifying tab-specific DB isolation. Each test hits a tab endpoint then asserts various mock_db methods were not called. Currently, only the metadata test checks all 6 DB methods; the other 5 tests only check 3 of 6 — missing assert_not_called for get_audio_events_for_media, count_embeddings_for_media, and/or get_faces_for_media. Extracting _assert_only_called will (a) DRY up 21 repeated assert_not_called lines into 6 one-liner calls, (b) fix incomplete assertions in 5 tests by always checking all 6 methods, and (c) make adding new DB methods a single-line change to _DB_METHODS. The helper is a private class method accepting mock_db and *allowed method name strings. It iterates a class-level _DB_METHODS tuple and calls assert_not_called on any method not in allowed. Each test keeps its explicit assert_called_once() for positive verification. Two meta-tests validate the helper's contract directly.

prerequisites.description: Verify existing tests pass: run pytest tests/test_media_detail.py::TestTabPerTabFetching to establish green baseline

steps.description: Write test_assert_only_called_rejects_unexpected: create a MagicMock, call mock_db.get_transcript() on it, then invoke self._assert_only_called(mock_db) with no allowed args — expect pytest.raises(AssertionError). This fails because the helper doesn't exist yet.

Add _DB_METHODS class constant tuple: ('get_media_detail', 'get_transcript', 'get_detections_for_media', 'get_faces_for_media', 'get_audio_events_for_media', 'count_embeddings_for_media'). Implement _assert_only_called(self, mock_db, *allowed) that iterates _DB_METHODS and calls getattr(mock_db, name).assert_not_called() for each name not in the allowed set. Step-1 meta-test now passes.

Write test_assert_only_called_permits_allowed: create a MagicMock, call mock_db.get_transcript(), invoke self._assert_only_called(mock_db, 'get_transcript') — should NOT raise. Verifies the allowed-skip logic works.

Refactor test_metadata_tab_does_not_call_get_transcript: replace 6 individual assert_not_called lines (lines 1031-1036) with self._assert_only_called(mock_db). Behavior is identical since metadata tab allows no DB methods.

Refactor test_transcript_tab_calls_get_transcript_only: replace 3 assert_not_called lines with self._assert_only_called(mock_db, 'get_transcript'). This also adds previously-missing not-called checks for get_audio_events_for_media and count_embeddings_for_media.

Refactor test_detections_tab_calls_get_detections_only: replace 3 assert_not_called lines with self._assert_only_called(mock_db, 'get_detections_for_media'). Adds missing checks for get_faces_for_media, get_audio_events_for_media, count_embeddings_for_media.

Refactor test_faces_tab_calls_get_faces_only: replace 3 assert_not_called lines with self._assert_only_called(mock_db, 'get_faces_for_media'). Adds missing checks for get_audio_events_for_media, count_embeddings_for_media.

Refactor test_audio_events_tab_calls_get_audio_events_only: replace 3 assert_not_called lines with self._assert_only_called(mock_db, 'get_audio_events_for_media'). Adds missing checks for get_faces_for_media, count_embeddings_for_media.

Refactor test_embeddings_tab_calls_count_embeddings_only: replace 3 assert_not_called lines with self._assert_only_called(mock_db, 'count_embeddings_for_media'). Adds missing checks for get_faces_for_media, get_audio_events_for_media.
Run full TestTabPerTabFetching suite (8 tests: 6 original + 2 meta-tests) to confirm all pass as final regression check.

design_decisions.decision: Helper is a private method (_assert_only_called) on the class, not a standalone function or fixture
design_decisions.rationale: Follows existing class pattern where _get_client and _MEDIA_ROW are class-level. Keeps the helper co-located with its only consumers. No need for cross-class reuse.

design_decisions.decision: DB method names stored in a class-level _DB_METHODS tuple constant
design_decisions.rationale: Single source of truth. When a new DB method is added to the isolation boundary, only this tuple needs updating. Tuple is immutable and ordered, appropriate for a fixed set.

design_decisions.decision: Helper only performs assert_not_called; each test keeps its own assert_called_once
design_decisions.rationale: Separation of concerns: the helper enforces 'nothing else was called', while each test body explicitly documents the positive expectation. This reads more clearly and matches the intent — the helper guards against over-fetching, each test verifies correct fetching.

design_decisions.decision: Refactoring strengthens assertions in 5 of 6 tests as a side-effect
design_decisions.rationale: Currently only the metadata test checks all 6 DB methods; the others only check 3. The helper fills these gaps automatically. For example, transcript tab was not checking get_audio_events_for_media or count_embeddings_for_media. This is a correctness improvement, not just a DRY cleanup.

design_decisions.decision: Two meta-tests validate the helper contract directly
design_decisions.rationale: Since the helper encodes critical isolation logic used by all 6 tests, a direct positive test (allowed method not flagged) and negative test (unexpected call caught) ensures correctness before we depend on it everywhere.

reuse.how: Meta-tests reuse this to get a properly configured MagicMock for testing the helper. No changes needed.
Meta-tests can use MagicMock directly to construct controlled mocks for testing the helper's assertion logic without needing the full client/patch stack.
